{% extends "registration/base.html" %} {% load i18n %} {% block content %}

{% blocktrans trimmed %} Weve emailed you instructions for setting your password, if an account exists with the email you entered. You should receive them shortly. {% endblocktrans %}

{% blocktrans trimmed %} If you dont receive an email, please make sure youve entered the address you registered with, and check your spam folder. {% endblocktrans %}

{% endblock %}
